name: bug-fix
description: Fix a bug with proper investigation, fix, and regression test

tasks.name: investigate-{affected_area}
tasks.instruction: Read the code in {affected_area}. Reproduce the bug. Identify the root cause. Record findings as a decision with reasoning.

tasks.name: fix-{affected_area}
tasks.instruction: Fix the root cause identified in T-001. Make the minimal change needed. Do not refactor surrounding code unless directly related to the fix.

tasks.name: regression-test-{affected_area}
tasks.instruction: Write a test that would have caught this bug. The test should fail without the fix and pass with it. Add to existing test suite.
